---
name: New Dot Phrase
about: Propose a new documentation template
title: "[Phrase] "
labels: new-phrase
---

## What phrase are you proposing?

**Proposed name:** (e.g., "Status Epilepticus Admission Orders")
**Proposed trigger:** (e.g., `.se-admit`)
**Category:** (stroke / tia / headache / seizure / general — or propose a new one)

## Why is this phrase needed?

A sentence or two on the clinical workflow this serves and why existing templates don't cover it.

## Draft content

Paste your proposed template text below. Use `***` for fill-in sections. Do not include institution-specific content (hospital names, physician names, internal pager numbers) or PHI.

```
(draft here)
```

## Source / evidence base

Cite the guideline, review article, or textbook this draws from. "My hospital's Epic library" is not an acceptable source.

- Source:
- Link / DOI:

## Clinician review

- [ ] I am a licensed clinician, or
- [ ] A licensed clinician has reviewed the content above

## Anything else?

Edge cases, variations by subspecialty, etc.
